BODY DOUBLE
description: When this model is taken out, it does not drop Gear and Loot (and keeps all equipped Gear and Loot [end of game] as normal]. The next time you Inspire Your Team, target a model within RED of any friendly model and it suffers one wound. Then discard this card. Being taken out this way does not count for any objectives.
